Simple Wikipedia

The Free Encyclopedia

Welcome to Simple Wikipedia

Simple Wikipedia is a free encyclopedia written in simple English. It has over 200,000 articles and is easy to understand.

🔍 Search

Use the search bar above to find articles on any topic.

🎲 Random

Click "Random article" to discover something new.

📚 Browse

Explore thousands of articles on various subjects.
